article.title: Apple made marketing gold from the Power Mac G4 'supercomputer' export ban in 1999 — Pentagon banned sales of the 400 MHz G4 in 50 countries when it launched and became the first PC to be classed as a weapon
article.summary: In the context of the recent tech export bans, we look back at the Apple PowerMac G4 export ban from 1999 and Steve Jobs making marketing gold from the situation.
article.title_zh: Apple 從 Power Mac G4「超級電腦」1999 年出口禁令中獲得營銷黃金 — 五角大廈在 400 MHz G4 推出時禁止其在 50 個國家銷售，成為首款被列為武器的個人電腦
article.summary_zh: 在最近科技出口禁令的背景下，我們回顧 1999 年 Apple PowerMac G4 的出口禁令，以及 Steve Jobs 如何從中創造營銷奇蹟。

article.title: Anthropic Block Marks US Reversal, Warning to Silicon Valley
article.summary: The extraordinary move by the US to bar foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s best AI models underscores the Trump administration’s newfound willingness to exert control over a pivotal industry. It also reminds Silicon Valley that it’s working with an imperfectly understood technology with uncertain impact.
article.title_zh: Anthropic禁令標誌美國政策逆轉，對矽谷的警告
article.summary_zh: 美國採取非常措施限制外國使用Anthropic PBC最先進AI模型，突顯川普政府願意對此關鍵產業施加控制。

article.title: Carney Says Anthropic Ban Shows Risk of Relying on Big AI Models
article.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said the US export ban blocking all foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s latest artificial intelligence models underscores the risk of depending on just a handful of powerful AI tools.
article.title_zh: 卡尼表示Anthropic禁令顯示依賴大型AI模型的風險
article.summary_zh: 加拿大總理馬克·卡尼表示，美國出口禁令阻止所有外國使用Anthropic PBC最新AI模型，突顯仰賴少數強大AI工具的風險。

article.title: Microsoft is reportedly testing Copilot+ AI features with discrete GPUs instead of NPUs — a feature available on Windows App SDK with a Windows Insider Experimental Channel build and Developer Mode turned on
article.summary: Microsoft is experimenting with Windows AI features on non-Copilot devices, finally allowing AI features to run on discrete GPUs. This move expands its user base and gives more users access to Windows 11 local AI capabilities.
article.title_zh: Microsoft 據報正測試搭載獨立 GPU 而非 NPU 的 Copilot+ AI 功能 — 該功能可在 Windows App SDK 中使用，配備 Windows Insider 實驗頻道組態和開發者模式
article.summary_zh: Microsoft 正在非 Copilot 裝置上測試 Windows AI 功能，最終允許 AI 功能在獨立 GPU 上執行，擴展用戶群並讓更多用戶存取 Windows 11 本機 AI 功能。

article.title: OpenAI hit with sweeping probe from massive coalition of 42 US state attorneys general just days after reported IPO filing — subpoena targets ChatGPT maker’s ads, data practices, handling of minors, model sycophancy, and safety policies
article.summary: State attorneys general have opened a broad investigation into OpenAI, subpoenaing documents on ads, user retention, data handling, minors, health data, model behavior, and safety policies.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 遭 42 州檢察總長組成的龐大聯盟全面調查，時間距報導 IPO 申請僅數日 — 傳票涉及 ChatGPT 製造商的廣告、資料實踐、未成年人處理、模型媚俗行為和安全政策
article.summary_zh: 州檢察總長已針對 OpenAI 啟動廣泛調查，傳喚有關廣告、用戶留存、資料處理、未成年人、健康資料、模型行為和安全政策的文件。

article.title: Researchers recycle old phones and cluster them into ‘computing platforms’ — says processors on modern smartphones deliver higher single-core performance than comparable multicore servers
article.summary: A team of researchers from UC San Diego found that 'old' smartphones from 2023 could be combined to build a server capable of running apps locally, instead of relying on cloud servers located on a distant site.
article.title_zh: 研究人員將舊手機回收並組合成「運算平台」— 稱現代智慧型手機上的處理器的單核效能超越可比的多核伺服器
article.summary_zh: 來自加州大學聖地亞哥分校的研究團隊發現，2023 年的「舊」智慧型手機可組合成能在本地運行應用的伺服器，無需依賴遠端雲伺服器。

article.title: US government warned Anthropic that Fable 5 had been jailbroken, but firm 'refused' to fix before US implemented export controls — Anthropic defended its decision by saying the jailbreak 'isn’t serious,' Chinese group had reportedly accessed model
article.summary: David Sacks said the US government warned Anthropic that Claude Fable 5 had been jailbroken and that CEO Dario Amodei refused to fix the flaw.
article.title_zh: 美國政府警告 Anthropic Fable 5 遭越獄，但公司「拒絕」在美國實施出口管制前修復 — Anthropic 聲稱該越獄「不嚴重」為由為決定辯護，中國團隊據報曾存取該模型
article.summary_zh: David Sacks 表示美國政府警告 Anthropic Claude Fable 5 遭越獄，CEO Dario Amodei 拒絕修復該漏洞。

article.title: Supermicro 推搭載英特爾 Xeon 6+ 處理器新伺服器方案，助大型雲端及資料中心降低總擁有成本，加速服務上線
article.summary: AI、企業級運算、儲存及 5G／邊緣運算整體解決方案供應商 Super Micro Computer, Inc […]
article.title_zh: Supermicro 推搭載英特爾 Xeon 6+ 處理器新伺服器方案，助大型雲端及資料中心降低總擁有成本，加速服務上線
article.summary_zh: AI、企業級運算、儲存及 5G／邊緣運算整體解決方案供應商 Super Micro Computer, Inc […]

article.title: Anthropic 被政府命令九十分鐘內下架最新 AI 模型，背後到底發生什麼事？
article.summary: 在生成式 AI 發展的戰場上，一場突如其來的「國安危機」正引爆華府與矽谷的劇烈摩擦。 《AXIOS》引述 An […]
article.title_zh: Anthropic 被政府命令九十分鐘內下架最新 AI 模型，背後到底發生什麼事？
article.summary_zh: 在生成式 AI 發展的戰場上，一場突如其來的「國安危機」正引爆華府與矽谷的劇烈摩擦。 《AXIOS》引述 An […]

article.title: What your logs can’t tell you when an AI agent acts alone
article.summary: For a long time, logs lived in a strange purgatory: technically required, rarely read, and mostly forgotten until something broke. The typical pattern looked like this: engineering teams would wire up logging because it was considered good practice, or because an auditor had it on a checklist. The logs got generated. They went somewhere — an S3 bucket, a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system, a flat file on a server — and then nobody looked at them. Not because teams were negligent, but because the logs weren’t built to be looked at. They were a dump. A timestamp and an event ID and a string of metadata that required real forensic patience to make sense of. The only time anyone went digging was after an incident. And that’s exactly when you’d
article.title_zh: 當 AI 代理獨立行動時，您的日誌無法告訴您什麼
article.summary_zh: 日誌長期處於尷尬境地：技術上必需但很少被閱讀，直到出現問題才被想起。工程團隊通常出於最佳實踐或審計清單要求而設置日誌記錄。

article.title: Why AI retrieval and ranking need more than vector search
article.summary: A recent GigaOm CxO Decision Brief explores how AI retrieval architectures are evolving beyond flat vector databases as organizations combine semantic search, ranking, personalization, and machine learning inference in production systems. Vector search changed the AI infrastructure landscape by making semantic retrieval practical at scale. By converting text, images, and user behavior into embeddings, organizations could move beyond exact keyword matching and retrieve information based on meaning. But production AI systems rarely stop at vector similarity. A real-world query often requires multiple signals to be evaluated simultaneously. Semantic relevance may be one factor, but so are structured attributes, business rules, personalization signals, freshness, access controls, recommendatio
article.title_zh: 為什麼 AI 檢索和排名需要超越向量搜尋
article.summary_zh: GigaOm CxO Decision Brief 探討了 AI 檢索架構如何超越扁平向量資料庫，透過在生產系統中結合語義搜尋、排名、個性化和機器學習推論來演進。向量搜尋通過改變 AI 基礎設施格局而使組織能夠提升搜尋能力。

article.title: How Google Is Reinventing Search with AI
article.summary: Google is making the biggest change to its search business in more than two decades, integrating AI-generated answers, conversational search, and reasoning tools directly into the heart of its search product, which has shaped the course of content and the internet.. Nick Fox, Google’s Senior Vice President of Knowledge and Information, argues that AI allows users to ask more complex questions and get faster, more useful answers while still connecting people to content across the web. But, for creators and publishers, fewer keystrokes could make a difference. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Google 如何用 AI 重新發明搜尋
article.summary_zh: Google 正在對其搜尋業務進行二十多年來最大變革,將 AI 生成答案、對話式搜尋和推理工具直接整合到搜尋產品核心。

article.title: 繼三星全面導入外部AI　SK海力士也研議引進ChatGPT、Copilot
